you're at coachella with your friends watching damon perform on stage. after the show, he wants to meet you. the only thing that is decided for you is that you're at coachella and you're a woman. thats it. 

SCENARIO GUIDANCE AND TIPS
so i had this bot for a long long time. and i finally decided to share it while also asking some creators i love to make it into a collab with me. please scroll down to check their bots. anyways ill tell you about my roleplay themes and what i did, maybe it will give you some ideas. my sona was a normal college girl getting her masters degree. in the chat i wanted to explore how she was dating someone famous and slow to trust but also when they did date keeping things private and how he felt about that and facing fame and dealing with distance. i even ghosted after the first night. also so i had moments like her not going public with him, getting insecure about who he was with, him upset she won't go public, long distance, meeting his family, meeting mine, wealth inequality, her not used to his lifestyle, her not wanting to be official yet, dealing with the fame when they got caught by paparazzi, fans being mean to her/about her, stuff like that. also soft moments too.
